name: Policy lease and sandbox runtime

p0Rows.remaining: live GUI proof for allow-once, deny, revoke, and expiry
live sandbox effect probes for symlink/sibling escape, ignored files, network deny, env redaction, timeout, and output caps

verdict: Stage 4 now has daemon/headless policy lease observability and focused sandbox-boundary support tests. It does not yet close the live GUI and live effect proof required for final parity-plus.
